For `gpa`, put `@property` on the line above `def gpa(self):` and return `sum(self.grades) / len(self.grades)`.
For `__repr__`, use `f"Student(name={self.name!r}, gpa={self.gpa:.1f})"`. The `:.1f` formats to one decimal place.
For `__lt__`, return `self.gpa < other.gpa`. Python's `sorted()` will use this to order students.
For `add_grade`, call `self.grades.append(score)`. Because `gpa` is computed from `self.grades` each time, it will automatically reflect the new score.
